summary: Profile-First Questioning feature tested successfully. All 11 pytest tests passed (100%). Mira correctly uses Pet Intelligence data (allergies, breed, life stage) silently instead of asking for information that already exists in the profile. Key features verified: DINE delivers plan using chicken allergy, CELEBRATE shows cake options without asking for allergies, STAY/TRAVEL ask only moment-specific questions.

minor.observation: In DINE pillar, temporal awareness mentions upcoming birthday contextually
minor.behavior: When asking about daily meals, response includes 'Since Mojo's birthday is just 2 days away...'
minor.assessment: This is intentional temporal awareness, NOT pillar bleed. Key verification: celebrate_picks is empty in DINE (no cake products shown). Contextual birthday mention is OS intelligence feature.
minor.recommendation: No action required - this is working as designed

dine_meal_plan_uses_profile_allergy.message: Custom meal plan delivers immediately using chicken allergy from profile, does NOT ask 'what allergies does Mojo have?'

dine_pillar_isolation.message: DINE pillar does NOT show celebrate_picks (cake products). Contextual birthday mention is temporal awareness.
dine_pillar_isolation.verification: celebrate_picks=[] in os_context for DINE queries

celebrate_cake_uses_profile_allergy.message: Birthday cake query uses chicken allergy from profile, does NOT ask 'any allergies?'

celebrate_no_permission_loop.message: 'Suggest cake options' shows options immediately without asking permission again

stay_boarding_uses_profile.message: Boarding query asks only moment-specific questions (which city), NOT 'is Mojo anxious?'
stay_boarding_uses_profile.verification: stay_context contains temperament data, only asks location/dates

travel_flying_uses_profile_breed.message: Flying query uses breed data, detects brachycephalic=false for Indie, asks only destination/dates

travel_asks_only_moment_specific.message: TRAVEL pillar asks only 'which route/city' - NOT asking for breed/weight/allergies
travel_asks_only_moment_specific.verification: No forbidden profile questions in response

celebrate_shows_cake_products.message: CELEBRATE pillar correctly shows 8 cake picks with concierge_handoff available
